reasoning: The base rate for a random team to win the NBA Cup is 1/30 (approx 3.3%). However, the Portland Trail Blazers are one of the weakest teams in the league, having missed the playoffs the previous season (35-44 record). Furthermore, they are in a highly competitive group featuring Denver, Houston, Golden State, and San Antonio. Current betting odds for them just to win their group are +1700 (implying a ~5.5% chance), which makes their probability of advancing and then winning the knockout rounds exceptionally low. Taking these factors into consideration, the true probability is well below 1%, so I am submitting the minimum allowed probability of 2%.
batch_queries: Will the Portland Trail Blazers win the NBA Cup?
